title: Revolving Spice Rack Organizer - Spinning Countertop Herb and Spice Storage Rack Tower Organizer with 12 Empty Glass Jars Bottles and Labels, Rotating Spice Holder Shelf Seasoning Rack
features: Organized and accessible: This spice rack carousel keeps your favorite spices your favorite flavors at Your Fingertips. No more searching for garlic powder or basil in a cluttered cabinet or drawer

Space-saving and stylish: The double-decker compact spice rack fits twice the amount of spice bottles in the same space as a single layer rack. It also matches well with your stainless-steel appliances on the counter or in the cabinet
12 Spice Jars are Included: The spice rack organizer includes 12jars (Not include spices) and features sift pour tops for easy measuring and seasoning.
Fresh and neat: The glass jars with metallic twist caps keep your herbs and spices fresh and organized. The inner sifter allows you to pour or shake the seasonings as you prefer
Stay organized with Jar Labels: Pre-filled labels transform your spice game. The labels make it easy to identify the contents and upgrade the look of your spice station
description: Product Description The vertical design helps you save precious counter or cabinet space Each jar fits a lot without taking much room Each home kitchen deserves this versatile Revolving Spice Rack Organizer.
